nodes.name: Weekly Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 9 AM to analyze past week

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM agent_runs WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

nodes.name: Get Agent Runs
nodes.notes: Retrieve all agent executions from past week

nodes.name: Analyze Metrics
nodes.notes: Calculate success rates and identify patterns

nodes.name: Format Report
nodes.notes: Format detailed weekly report for admin

nodes.name: Send Report to Admin
nodes.notes: Send weekly analysis to admin via WhatsApp

nodes.name: Save Report to DB
nodes.notes: Store weekly analysis for historical tracking

nodes.name: Propose A/B Tests
nodes.notes: Identify candidates for prompt improvement A/B testing

nodes.name: Send Test Proposal
nodes.notes: Ask admin for approval of prompt variations
